badcases.human_expected: Sparse brief should still trigger the video creative Skill and ask only essential clarifying questions internally.
badcases.observed_behavior: v1 did not trigger and fell back to a generic product content plan.
badcases.root_cause: description relied on explicit video/product wording and did not cover sparse creator-style requests.
badcases.suggested_action: Broaden description to include creator brief, Bilibili-style video title, cover, demo, outline, or spoken script requests.

badcases.human_expected: Cover-only request should trigger the Skill and load cover-specific rules.
badcases.observed_behavior: v1 missed the request because it was not framed as a full video package.
badcases.root_cause: description did not clearly list cover text as a direct trigger.
badcases.suggested_action: Add cover text, thumbnail copy, and title-cover pairing to trigger conditions.

badcases.human_expected: Official press-release writing should not trigger a Bilibili video creative Skill.
badcases.observed_behavior: v1 triggered because its description said promotional content for AI products.
badcases.root_cause: description lacked negative boundaries for press releases and generic non-video marketing copy.
badcases.suggested_action: Add explicit do-not-use boundaries for press releases, official articles, project plans, and non-video content.
